tools.name: ElevenLabs
tools.description: AI voice platform offering ultra-realistic text-to-speech, voice cloning, speech-to-text, music generation, and dubbing across 70+ languages with 11,000+ voices.
tools.referrals: yes - Enterprise Commercial Partner Program for consultancies to earn commission.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: 2 concurrent requests (Multilingual v2), 4 concurrent (Flash). Personal non-commercial use only with attribution.
free_tier_limits.notes: Includes all TTS models, STT, Sound Effects, Voice Design, Music, 3 Studio projects. No commercial rights on free plan.

tools.notes: Industry-leading voice quality. Trusted by Meta, Disney, Epic Games. Startup Grants: 12 months free with 33M characters. SOC 2, ISO 27001 certified.

tools.name: Murf AI
tools.description: Ultra-realistic AI voice generator with 200+ voices across 35+ languages, offering studio-quality voiceovers, voice cloning, dubbing, and real-time voice agent APIs.
tools.referrals: yes - Affiliate program 20% recurring commission for 24 months. Reseller and Technology Partner programs.

free_tier_limits.voice_variety: 200+ voices accessible for preview, download/export blocked
free_tier_limits.rate_limits: 10 projects max, 1 editor, no audio export/download, no commercial rights
free_tier_limits.notes: Free tier is preview-only — test voice quality in-browser but cannot download. Unused minutes do not carry over.

tools.notes: Murf Falcon fastest model (55ms latency, $0.01/min). Gen 2 for studio-quality. SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA compliant. 300+ Forbes 2000 companies.

tools.name: Free AI
tools.description: 400+ AI tools platform with self-hosted open-source models. TTS with 174 voices in 37 languages, music generation, voice cloning — all free with daily token allowance.
tools.referrals: yes - both get 30,000 bonus tokens per referral.

free_tier_limits.free_voice_clones: included in daily pool (~500 tokens per clone)
free_tier_limits.notes: No credit card required. Self-hosted models use fewer tokens. Tokens reset every 24h. Purchased tokens never expire.

tools.notes: 380+ total models. 38 self-hosted on A100 GPUs. OpenAI-compatible API. All content royalty-free. Education discount: free Pro for .edu emails.

tools.name: SpeechGen
tools.description: AI voice generator with 5,000+ realistic voices in 150 languages, offering Standard, Pro, and HD voice tiers with pay-as-you-go pricing.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: 3,000 chars/day for 7 days (renews daily). Smart Cache allows re-generating identical text at zero cost.
free_tier_limits.notes: No watermark on free tier. Pay-as-you-go credits valid for 1 year. Commercial license included.

tools.notes: 3 voice tiers: Standard (1 limit = 2 chars), Pro (1 limit = 1 char), HD (1 limit = 0.5 chars). 500K+ users, 700M+ files generated.

tools.name: FineVoice
tools.description: Free all-in-one AI voice generator with 1,500+ voices across 154 languages, offering TTS, voice cloning, voice changing, sound effects, and more — no sign-up required.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: 1000 chars/input, 15 min/day voice change, 30 credits/day SFX, 3 BGM generations, 60 talking photos, 5 voice designs
free_tier_limits.notes: Free tier preview-only for some features. TTS Max (emotion tags) not on free. Unused credits do not carry over. No sign-up required for basic use.

tools.notes: 1,500+ AI voices. TTS Max supports emotion tags ([happy], [sad]) and vocalizations ([breathe], [laugh]) — paid only. 24-hour auto data deletion. Enterprise API available.

tools.name: Speech Gen AI
tools.description: AI voice generator with 5,000+ realistic voices in 150+ languages. Pay-as-you-go pricing, no subscription required.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: 3,000 chars/day for 7 days after free sign-up. Smart Cache allows free re-generation of same text.
free_tier_limits.notes: No watermarks. Pay-as-you-go credits valid 1 year. Commercial license included.

tools.notes: 3 voice tiers: Standard (1 limit = 2 chars), Pro (1 limit = 1 char), HD (1 limit = 0.5 chars). 500K+ users, 700M+ files generated.

tools.name: TTS.ai
tools.description: Most comprehensive AI voice platform with 33+ open-source TTS models, 279+ voices, 39+ languages. Also offers STT, voice cloning, AI music, and audio tools.

free_tier_limits.notes: Free models (Kokoro, Piper, VITS, MeloTTS, etc.) use 1:1 character ratio. Standard models 2x, Premium 4x. Daily limit resets midnight UTC. Commercial use OK.

tools.notes: All models MIT/Apache 2.0. No data stored after delivery. OpenAI-compatible API. Student/nonprofit discounts up to 30% off.

tools.name: FreeTTS.ai
tools.description: Free AI text-to-speech generator with 322 neural voices across 75+ languages, powered by Edge-TTS. No account required.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: 10 gens/day (guest), 50 gens/day (signed up). 2,000 chars per generation.
free_tier_limits.notes: All 322 voices + 8 styles free. MP3 output. Commercial use allowed. Powered by Edge-TTS. No pricing page — entirely free.

tools.notes: Distinct from freetts.org and freetts.com. 8 voice styles: Default, Natural, Newsreader, Scary, Professional, Energetic, Storyteller, Calm. HD voices and API coming soon.

tools.name: AnySpeech
tools.description: AI Voice Studio with 247+ natural voices in 50+ languages, offering TTS, voice cloning, STT, voice isolator, and AI podcast generator.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: 5,000 characters per request max. Standard voices available without sign-up. Advanced/Pro voices preview only on free.
free_tier_limits.notes: Free tier gets 5,000 credits one-time. No commercial use on free. Voice cloning requires paid plan. Free TTS page uses Google TTS with no sign-up.

tools.notes: 6 paid tiers from $9.99/mo (Basic, 50K credits) to $199/mo (Max, 2M credits). Credit packages $9.99-$99.99 valid 90 days. Zero-shot voice cloning (10-30 sec sample).

tools.name: VoiceGenerator.io
tools.description: Free browser-based voice generator using built-in TTS technology with pitch and speed controls. No login, no AI models — uses device's native TTS voices.

free_tier_limits.notes: Uses browser's native TTS voices, not AI models. Voice quality depends entirely on system TTS voices. Better alternatives exist for serious use.

tools.notes: Extremely basic tool — not AI-powered. Uses browser's built-in speech synthesis. Interface is dated. No models listed as it doesn't use AI.

tools.name: FakeYou
tools.description: Community-powered AI voice playground with 3,500+ character/celebrity voices. TTS, voice-to-voice conversion, F5-TTS voice cloning, and video lip-sync.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: 12-second max clip length, 5-15 min queue wait during peak, lowest queue priority, ads displayed
free_tier_limits.notes: Free tier limited by queue times and 12-second clip cap, not character count. Account required for downloads. No commercial use on free.

tools.notes: Founded 2020 (originally Vocodes) by Brandon Thomas, Atlanta. 10M+ users. Quality varies across models. Commercial use requires Elite plan ($25/mo). Supports EN, ES, IT, DE, PT, FR.

tools.name: ttsmp3.com
tools.description: Free text-to-speech and MP3 download tool with 28+ languages, powered by AWS Polly (regular) and OpenAI TTS (AI voices). Supports SSML.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: Daily character cap only. No login required.
free_tier_limits.notes: Both regular and AI voices usable free without login. No commercial restrictions. Premium tiers with up to 10M chars/year. API requires 1-year premium.

tools.notes: Two engines: Regular (AWS Polly, 60+ voices, 28 languages, 3000 chars/day) and AI (OpenAI TTS, 9 voices, 1000 chars/day). AI voices support Voice Instructions for tone/emotion customization.
